presale.body:
The AE will be responsible for:

  • owning direct client communication on all account RFPs
  • communicating with the account strategist on Market Reports and including the AS on all client communication
  • sending the media plan and proposal deck to the client

postsale.body:
The AE will be responsible for:

  • staying aware of communication from pod, where they may need assistance managing through challenging situations with client

prelaunch.body:
The AE will be responsible for:

  • assisting the Account Strategist to build the kickoff call agendas

postlaunch.body:
The AE will be responsible for:

  • managing the day-to-day communications with the client
  • supervising optimization recommendations, incremental media plans and mid-campaign reports made by the account strategist
  • submitting and managing any PYM make-good cases
  • supervising the campaign wrap up report made by the account strategist
  • sending the wrap up report, upsell recommendations and renewal recommendations to the client

presale.body:
The AS will be responsible for:

  • providing support on RFPs or instances where the AE can not respond
  • supervising the media planning process made by the campaign specialist
  • pulling screenshots and creating the proposal deck
  • submitting PYM pricing approval and COGS approval requests
  • supervising the Slingshot order management process done by the campaign specialist
  • identifying strategic initiatives and opportunities to align with client KPIs, both inside and outside of a formal RFP process, and presenting those to the AE to deliver to the client

postsale.body:
The AS will be responsible for:

  • supervising the internal IO approval process done by the campaign specialist
  • supervising any sponsorship requests made by the campaign specialist

prelaunch.body:
The AS will be responsible for:

  • leading the internal kickoff call process
  • leading the external kickoff call process
  • managing day-to-day communication with the account executive about products, assets, timelines, etc.
  • submitting ad guidelines review requests
  • submitting approval to run requests

postlaunch.body:
The AS will be responsible for:

  • respond to Account Executive inquiries on campaign status and performance
  • analyzing campaign delivery and performance against client objectives and KPIs
  • making optimization recommendations
  • building and sending incremental/upsell media plans to the AE
  • building and sending mid-campaign report to the AE
  • creating campaign wrap reports
  • adding billing notes for nuances during the post-launch phase
  • managing month end billing close and responding to billing cases

presale.body:
The CS will be responsible for:

  • pulling inventory forecasts/avails
  • creating and revising media plans
  • completing the client’s media plan template and spec sheet
  • entering plan details into third party order management systems
  • pulling and analyzing research requests for pitches, wrap ups or ad hoc needs
  • booking sponsorship requests

postsale.body:
The CS will be responsible for:

  • managing the IO approval process
  • confirming sponsorship requests

prelaunch.body:
The CS will be responsible for:

  • creating ad ops castles in Salesforce and campaign folders on the Shared Drive
  • building and sending the client timelines for creative deliverables, asset requests, ad spec sheets, and creative production requirements
  • responding to client inquiries regarding products, assets, timelines, etc.
  • confirming third party billing ad server login details
  • reviewing and validating third party tags
  • submitting Creative Services JIRA tasks
  • managing communication with creative production vendors
  • managing client approval of Pandora produced display and audio creative
  • submitting and managing AdTech, Trafficking and Theorem requests
  • trafficking line items
  • testing, taking and managing screenshots

postlaunch.body:
The CS will be responsible for:

  • pulling and sending launch reports and live confirmation emails to the client
  • maintaining the ad ops castle
  • monitoring campaign delivery and performance
  • pulling campaign delivery reports
  • managing the RIO approval process
  • updating placement-level billing ad server information
